title: BACAPED Language Pack
description: Language pack for translating advancements from BACAP Enhanced Discoveries
body:
# BACAP Enhanced Discoveries Language Pack
This is a resource pack which translates BACAP Enhanced Discoveries into other languages.
Translations are made by community, so it might contain some issues.
**This resource pack has no effect on vanilla Minecraft.**

## Supported languages
The version numbers listed relate to the versions of the datapack, not of Minecraft.

**Latest BACAPED version: 2.7.1**

- Russian (2.7.1) by ItzSkyReed
- Spanish (2.6.9) by Marco Herrera SickJtx and Coolgirlomega
- Chinese (2.7.1) by Acikizape 
- Pirate Speak (2.4.10) by ParzivalAFK

## Installation and usage

This is a resource pack, so it has different installation instructions to the Enhanced Discoveries.

1. Enter Minecraft’s Resource Pack menu, then click “Open Pack Folder”
2. Copy and paste the BACAPED Language Pack into the folder.
3. Select it, then in Minecraft’s Languages menu, select the language you want to play in. This will cause the names and descriptions of advancements to appear in the selected language, if it is supported. Trophies and the config menu are also translated.

## Help us translate
If you want to help translate by updating an existing translation or translating a new language, follow these instructions.

1. Open the `base_translation` file inside `Enhanced-Discoveries Language Pack/assets/minecraft/lang`, which is a language file  without translation values, that comes with the latest version of the BACAPED Language Pack.
2. Follow the instructions inside to translate it.
3. After that you can fork [BACAP-Enhanced-Discoveries](<https://github.com/Komaru-cats/BACAP-Enhanced-Discoveries>) on GitHub and create a [pull request](<https://github.com/Komaru-cats/BACAP-Enhanced-Discoveries/pulls>) with your translation or/and create a new post with your translations here 
3.1 Or you can create a forum in a specified discord channel with your translation and after checking, we will add it.

**If you are running a server, please note in the description that it supports translation using the BACAPED Language Pack, and provide a link to the Modrinth Page**

If you have any questions, bugs, suggestions you can [create an issue on github](https://github.com/Komaru-cats/BACAP-Enhanced-Discoveries/issues) or [join our discord server](https://discord.gg/j9VKsyXPhz)
